stemHtml: If RAIM was checked during flight preparation, should NOTAMs also be checked, and for what reasons?

options.a: Check NOTAMs because RAIM is only about EGNOS and does not cover all GNSS issues.
options.b: Do not check NOTAMs because RAIM concerns both EGNOS and all GNSS, making additional checks unnecessary.
options.c: Always check NOTAMs, as RAIM predictions might not include temporary changes affecting GNSS services like those documented in NOTAMs.
options.d: Do not check the NOTAMS because RAIM already checks the NOTAMS automatically.
